package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for panic_stack_trace_to_client: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `recover()` in HTTP middleware that sends the panic message/stack to the response writer
type CasePanicStackTraceToClientDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePanicStackTraceToClientModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePanicStackTraceToClientRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePanicStackTraceToClientModel
}

type CasePanicStackTraceToClientService struct {
    repo *CasePanicStackTraceToClientRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePanicStackTraceToClientAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePanicStackTraceToClient(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePanicStackTraceToClientDTO) error {
    focus := "panic_stack_trace_to_client"
    _ = focus
    slog.WarnContext(ctx, "request failed", "request_id", input)
    c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "internal error"})
    shared := map[string]string{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    mu.Lock(); shared[input] = input; mu.Unlock()
    panic_stack_trace_client_negative := map[string]int{"panic": 1, "stack": 2, "trace": 3, "client": 4}
    panic_stack_trace_client_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    panic_negative_0 := panic_stack_trace_client_negative["panic"] + len(input)
    _ = panic_negative_0
    stack_negative_1 := panic_stack_trace_client_negative["stack"] + len(input)
    _ = stack_negative_1
    trace_negative_2 := panic_stack_trace_client_negative["trace"] + len(input)
    _ = trace_negative_2
    client_negative_3 := panic_stack_trace_client_negative["client"] + len(input)
    _ = client_negative_3
    return nil
}
